item.title: Trapped 91yo man rescued after earthquake brought down buildings, killing two people, in China
item.description: More than a dozen buildings crumbled and thousands were sent running for their lives.

item.title: TV star and former model Katie Price claims husband Lee Andrews has been ‘kidnapped’ in Dubai
item.description: Katie Price’s final contact with the 43-year-old came as he was trying to board a flight to the UK.

item.title: Five dead after hate crime shooting at Islamic Centre in San Diego as teen gunmen identified
item.description: Police were already looking for one of the teenagers before the attack.

item.title: Trump pauses scheduled ‘large-scale assault’ on Iran at request of Gulf allies
item.description: The President said he had instructed the US military ‘to be prepared’ to go ahead with the attack at a moment’s notice.

item.title: More than 100 dead in rare Ebola virus outbreak in the Congo with US doctor among latest cases
item.description: A major decision by the Trump administration has come under fire as the crisis unfolds.

item.title: Boomers legend Joe Ingles signs with Melbourne United in long-awaited Australian homecoming
item.description: After 12 seasons in the NBA, Joe Ingles has made an ‘incredibly special’ decision.

item.title: Elon Musk filed his lawsuit against OpenAI too late, and a US jury has ruled against him
item.description: The jury deliberated less than two hours and it was a unanimous verdict.

item.title: The Briefing: CNN journalist Kara Fox warns online ‘rape academies’ are prevalent after shocking Gisele Pelicot case
item.description: ‘It’s not on the dark web.’

item.title: Aussie Olympian Raygun reveals career move into video site for fans after losing Macquarie University job
item.description: The breakdancer is hoping to cash in on her viral fame with a ‘fun’ side hustle.

item.title: ‘End of an era’: Generations mourn closure of iconic nightlife institution in Brisbane
item.description: ‘It’s like part of my youth is dying,’ one patron said.

item.title: Kylie Minogue admits she’s ‘so nervous’ ahead of AFL grand final show
item.description: ‘I don’t know how to prepare myself.’

item.title: Robert Irwin set to secure multimillion-dollar deal after Dancing With The Stars win
item.description: It was announced last month the young conservationist would be returning to the US for his next major career move.

item.title: Married At First Sight UK episodes pulled from streaming as brides allege sexual assault during production
item.description: According to a BBC report, all three women allege the show did not do enough to protect them.

item.title: Colombian singer Shakira wins tax fraud case: Judge orders Spanish government to pay the pop star $100m
item.description: ‘This decision comes after an ordeal that has taken an unacceptable toll.’

item.title: Gold Coast toddler Dusty returns home after near-fatal cake powder accident
item.description: Dusty’s father was involved in a car accident on his way to be with his son.

item.title: Brisbane Heat among several teams keen to play BBL opener in India
item.description: ‘We look forward to further discussions with CA.’

item.title: 'Different beast': Don't write off Wallabies for Cup
item.description: ‘A team shows up on the day, anything can happen.’

item.title: Drama at Collingwood as wannabe thief gets caught taking Scott Pendlebury branded football
item.description: A fan has been taken out in a citizen's arrest after attempting to steal a prized piece of memorabilia.

item.title: Australia considers tighter travel restrictions as Ebola outbreak escalates in Africa
item.description: Experts say the quick spread appears to be the ‘tip of the iceberg’.

item.title: Israeli forces intercept Gaza-bound flotilla in the Mediterranean after firing at the vessels
item.description: Video streamed live from the flotilla showed soldiers firing shots at two of the boats.

item.title: Carlos Alcaraz wiped out of another grand slam as world No.2 withdraws from Wimbledon
item.description: The world No.2 ‘will be missed’ as the tennis world waits to see if anyone else can challenge Jannik Sinner.

item.title: Arsenal crowned EPL champions after Man City fall short against Bournemouth
item.description: An impromptu late-night party broke out in London as a 22-year drought came to an end.

item.title: Writings of teen shooters reveal motivations for deadly San Diego Mosque attack
item.description: The ‘radicalised’ pair fatally shot three people before taking their own lives.

item.title: Carlton quietly settle with former list boss Nick Austin after five-minute ‘blindside’
item.description: The Blues bounced back on the field and now they’ve made another move after what wasn’t ‘a great week’ for the club.

item.title: Mary Fowler to return to Matildas squad fresh off Manchester City’s Super League win
item.description: Some of Australia’s biggest names have returned but some familiar faces have missed out.

item.title: US President Donald Trump shielded from future tax investigations into sons and businesses under explosive deal
item.description: ‘A get-out-of-jail-free card negotiated with himself.’

item.title: ‘I’m overcome’: Stolen war medals reunited with Brisbane family after nine years
item.description: ‘I never ever thought I’d ever see these again at all.’

item.title: Sydney girl with alopecia gets life-changing gift from generous strangers
item.description: Azaliah was too scared to go to school after losing her hair but that has all changed.

item.title: Netanyahu scolds Israeli minister for releasing videos taunting detained flotilla activists
item.description: World leaders have condemned the treatment of the detainees, labelling the incident ‘way out of line’ and ‘inadmissible’.

item.title: Socceroos star Riley McGree gets final shot at EPL as rivals lose $376m ‘Spygate’ appeal
item.description: The 27-year-old will play in the biggest game of his career just days before jetting off for the World Cup.

item.title: UK: King Charles death mistakenly announced by Radio Caroline, station blames ‘computer error’
item.description: ‘We have suspended our normal programmes until further notice as a mark of formal respect following the passing of his Majesty King Charles III.’

item.title: Bianca Adler, 18, becomes youngest Australian to summit Everest after second attempt
item.description: Bianca Adler is the youngest Australian to climb to the top of the world after summiting on her second attempt.

item.title: Racing Victoria mourns trainer Steve Richards’ death after tragic fall: ‘Lost a good man’
item.description: ‘Flemington will not be the same without seeing his smiling face each morning.’

item.title: Football Australia's record losses top $15 million
item.description: ‘It is obviously not a situation that is sustainable or acceptable.’

item.title: Queensland Olympics Minister Tim Mander stands down after facing federal investigation over voting address
item.description: The AEC says there was an ‘absence of compelling evidence’ the former rugby league referee lived at the address where he was registered to vote.

item.title: NRL champion Nathan Cleary not buying into claims he hasn’t ‘owned’ State of Origin
item.description: ‘It’s probably not something I think about too much.’

item.title: TV star Dr Chris Brown shares loved-up photos with partner Lorraine Monforte
item.description: The vet turned Dancing With The Stars host has fans swooning.

item.title: Circular saw murder trial: Jury hears John Yalu claim fatal amputation in Innisfail park was mercy
item.description: Jurors heard attempts to stop the bleeding with shopping bags and sticky tape failed.

item.title: Residents reported man acting suspiciously days before alleged break in, rape at Mount Pleasant
item.description: ‘As she’s popped up from the dishwasher, she’s just noticed a man staring at her.’

item.title: Queen was 'very keen' for former prince Andrew to become UK trade envoy, documents reveal
item.description: The UK government has released a trove of confidential documents on ‌the hiring process.

item.title: Ricky Stuart blasts NRL officials after Raiders lose to Dolphins
item.description: ‘I’m just so confused at the moment.’

item.title: Ebola case confirmed in rebel-held area of Democratic Republic of Congo
item.description: It signals the spread of an outbreak experts believe has circulated for months.

item.title: Trump vows to retrieve Iran’s uranium as peace talks stall
item.description: ‘We will get it. We don’t need it, we don’t want it. We’ll probably destroy it after we get it but we’re not going to let them have it.’

item.title: Aussie teenager Emerson Jones cops nightmare first-round draw against Iga Swiatek at French Open
item.description: The rising star has been dealt the worst possible outcome for her Roland Garros debut.

item.title: Beloved NASCAR champion Kyle Busch dies suddenly aged 41
item.description: Tributes are flowing after the popular racer was hospitalised and died days before one of the biggest races of the year.

item.title: Alex de Minaur hits clay-court stride in Germany days out from French Open
item.description: The Aussie star has been out of sorts recently but is finally starting to show glimpses of his very best.

item.title: Australians among hundreds of Gaza flotilla activists deported from Israel amid detention video backlash
item.description: Israel has been accused of torturing, humiliating and unlawfully detaining peaceful activists.

item.title: ‘Epic opportunity’: New Zealand invites Australian start-ups amid CGT changes
item.description: Entrepreneurial Aussies are being urged to take their business elsewhere ahead of major budget changes.

item.title: Ebola treatment centre burned down amid growing fear and anger over deadly outbreak
item.description: Doctors are struggling to contain the health crisis.

item.description: The Australian has found himself in the middle of what would be a monster shake-up to Formula 1.

item.title: Jessie J shares new health update on her breast cancer battle
item.description: ‘I sobbed for hours.’

item.title: Roger Federer leads tributes as tennis world mourns ‘wonderful journalist’ Howard Fendrich
item.description: The 55-year-old, who has died days before the French Open, became ‘part of the fabric of tennis’ during the Swiss great’s career.

item.title: ‘Horrendous’ update as veteran jockey Shane McGovern moved to palliative care
item.description: Doctors performed a third amputation before the ‘sad situation’ moved the family towards a difficult decision.

item.title: Sydney mother of special needs child wins battle to work from home
item.description: The mother-of-two was accused of trying to avoid the inconvenience of office-based work.

item.description: ‘There is still a long way to go.’

item.title: Nissan Skyline could return to Australia with manual gearbox
item.description: A sedan comeback of epic proportions could see the Skyline name return to Australia as a niche performance model – potentially with a manual gearbox.

item.title: Family devastated as Victoria Police sergeant dies after falling into ravine on Inca Trail in Peru
item.description: The 52-year-old was travelling with his wife when the tragic fall happened.

item.title: K-Pop band BTS make huge announcement for Australian ARMY fans
item.description: In 2022, the group went on hiatus as the members pursued solo projects and completed mandatory military service.

item.title: Former prince Andrew’s police investigation now assessing ‘sexual’ claims
item.description: The disgraced royal was arrested in February for suspicion of misconduct in public office.

item.title: Guzman y Gomez to close eight Chicago restaurants after failing to crack US market
item.description: Shares in an Aussie-born Mexican fast-food chain have surged after it pulled the pin on an attempt to crack a competitive market.

item.description: ‘No one wants to have to kill horses but there are still too many in Kosciuszko National Park.’

item.description: Katie Price claims the 43-year-old was ‘captured’ in a van while attempting to board a flight to the UK.

item.description: Stellantis' upcoming products for its American brands include a slinky Dodge sports coupe, a full-size Ram SUV, and (finally) some new Chryslers.

item.description: Australia’s manufacturing and engineering base has impressed the global boss of Nissan’s performance division, which could source parts locally.

item.description: An agricultural expert has issued a dire warning as a critical waterway remains closed.

item.description: Doctors say the development could help researchers better understand how the body naturally fights cancer.

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Citroen 2CV revived for back-to-basics EV
item.description: Retro is the future for EVs, at least for European brands, with Citroen confirming the 2CV will return in 2028 as a cut-price EV.

item.title: Head-on car crash kills three people in Sydney’s San Souci
item.description: Police have revealed new details about what led to the tragic crash.

item.title: St Kilda coach Ross Lyon calls out ‘bizarre’ tactics from Fremantle forward Pat Voss
item.description: ‘I thought it was a bit of a floorshow.’

item.title: Canterbury Cameron Ciraldo fires up over ‘bull****’ rumours about Matt Burton’s future
item.description: ‘It’s hard for us to defend them and then some people are copping a lot of unfair criticism.’

item.title: Nissan Terrano PHEV tops Nissan Australia wishlist
item.description: Nissan Australia’s new boss says the rugged Terrano plug-in hybrid SUV is one of the brand’s highest-priority models for local showrooms.

item.title: Health Star Rating: Warning as Australia moves to mandate food labels on packaged products
item.description: Companies have been able to ‘game’ the system for more than a decade.

item.title: Chevrolet Silverado, GMC Yukon EOFY offer brings free servicing
item.description: GM Specialty Vehicles is offering three years of free scheduled servicing for two of its models until the end of the financial year.

item.title: Young woman and baby killed in three-car collision at Oak Beach
item.description: Two others were rushed to hospital following the crash.

item.title: Carlton suspend podcaster’s membership after disgusting comment about ‘Besties’ fan group
item.description: The AFL industry has turned on the podcaster and his club has now cut the cord.

item.title: Host of children’s YouTube channel Danny Go! announces son’s death after years-long health battle
item.description: ‘Oh my sweet boy.’

item.title: How a special tattoo service is helping breast cancer survivors feel ‘complete’ again
item.description: ‘It hit something in me and I thought, ‘I can do that’.’

item.title: Veteran jockey Shane McGovern dies after horrible accident aged 67
item.description: The 67-year-old has sadly died after suffering horrendous injuries in a freak accident.

item.title: Essendon veteran Kyle Langford’s half-time interview in the spotlight: ‘Already a little out’
item.description: ‘I just don’t think you are.’

item.title: Stunning UFO footage released as Pentagon unseals second batch of classified files
item.description: One aerial encounter left an intelligence officer ‘virtually speechless’.

item.title: Motorcycle crash kills rider in Warialda, northern NSW
item.description: The woman is yet to be formally identified.

item.title: Surging One Nation vote tipped to fracture Australia’s two-party political system
item.description: Here’s how a surge in popularity for Pauline Hanson’s party will alter the political landscape.

item.title: ‘Our hearts are broken’: Family’s touching move after son killed in NSW farm accident
item.description: ‘We are now learning how to live with something no parent or sibling ever expects.’

item.title: Bruce McAvaney weighs in on Scott Pendlebury’s AFL/VFL games record
item.description: ‘It’s always contentious, and it’s something you wrestle with.’

item.title: US report reveals whether child deaths definitively linked to COVID shots
item.description: The Food and Drug Administration’s report was quietly made public last week.

item.title: New details emerge on NASCAR champion Kyle Busch’s sudden death
item.description: The 41-year-old was testing in a racing simulator when he suddenly became unresponsive.

item.title: Car crash kills one and injures three on a dirt road in rural WA
item.description: Three others have been hospitalised following the crash.

item.title: At least 90 dead after coal mine explosion in northern China’s Shanxi
item.description: Almost 250 workers were underground when disaster struck in China’s north.

item.title: Momentum builds for ‘amazing’ Jai Arrow fundraiser idea as South Sydney pay tribute
item.description: The Rabbitohs have vowed never to forget his heroics — and players are pushing to pitch in.

item.title: Government reveals fuel excise relief likely to remain temporary
item.description: The change was brought in to reduce skyrocketing costs due to war in the Middle East.

item.title: Last-second free kick completes North Melbourne’s comeback win from 43 points down against Gold Coast
item.description: The come-from-behind effort looked poised to secure a draw until one last roll of the dice paid off.

item.title: One-punch killer Kieran Loveridge fails in bid to have identity suppressed
item.description: He has been in the community since 2024 after being convicted of manslaughter.

item.title: Collingwood spring one last surprise for Scott Pendlebury’s record game as all players arrive with gold numbers
item.description: Craig McRae said the Pies ‘might get in trouble’ from the AFL but ‘we wanted to look like a team’.

item.title: Massage therapist charged with sexual assault of female clients in Perth
item.description: A number of women have come forward.

item.title: World Health Organization warns Congo Ebola outbreak at high risk of ‘spreading rapidly’
item.description: ‘We are now revising our risk assessment to very high.’

item.title: Toyota Supercars teams double up as Chaz Mostert and Andre Heimgartner win Saturday races from pole
item.description: Walkinshaw and Brad Jones Racing both shed growing pains to claim victories from pole.

item.title: The Issue: Anthony Albanese may attend FIFA World Cup and meet with US President Donald Trump
item.description: ‘We’ll be backing the Socceroos when it comes to the World Cup.’

item.title: Jamie Elliott suffers knee injury after Pies captain Darcy Moore ruled out with hamstring problem
item.description: Rival players scuffled right next to the injured goalkicker.

item.title: It Takes Two rapper Rob Base, who helped take hip-hop mainstream, dies at 59
item.description: The rapper, whose real name was Robert Ginyard, was best known for the 1988 chart-topper It Takes Two.

item.title: Gang kingpin Lorenzo Lamalu murdered in Vietnam leaving Sydney underworld on edge
item.description: Police are hunting two Australian men believed to be linked to the deadly shooting.

item.title: Former North Melbourne skipper Jy Simpkin pays tribute to late ‘blood brother’ Phoenix Spicer
item.description: His former teammate’s death ‘hit pretty hard’ and this moment ‘just meant so much’.
